docs.title: #incidents channel
docs.content:
Thread in #incidents:
carol: Seeing elevated error rates in Sentry. The payment-service is throwing 500s.
dave: Same. I see SENTRY-789 is the main error group. The payment-service seems to be hitting a timeout talking to the billing API.
carol: I'll page the on-call. payment-service is in prbe-payments repo.

docs.title: SENTRY-789: PaymentService timeout on billing API
docs.content:
Error group SENTRY-789
Project: prbe-payments
Message: Timeout connecting to billing-service after 5000ms
Occurrences: 4523 in last 24h
First seen: 2026-05-07 08:12:00 UTC

expected_edges.note: Slack incident thread explicitly discusses the Sentry error group SENTRY-789
